title: EMD Serono — Overview
html:
EMD Serono — Account Overview

Source: Rich Durante FY26 AO Plan (V2, Oct 2025) AO: Rich Durante (Principal) AD: Nick Fleischman (SM) FY25 Base: $161,000 (52% profitability) FY26 Target: $160,000 (0% growth, 55% profitability target)

Account Status

EMD Serono is currently a steady-state, small account within Rich's portfolio. FY26 target is flat — no growth expected. The account is primarily driven by Bavencio PET work (which Vinoth owns on the India side).

Key context for Vinoth:

  • This is one of Vinoth's owned projects (Bavencio)
  • Nick Fleischman is the US-side AD
  • The account has limited growth runway at current scope
  • Growth opportunities would need to come from expanding into other EMD Serono brands or service types

Revenue Context (within Rich's portfolio)

Metric Value
FY25 Base $161,000
FY26 Target $160,000
Growth target 0%
FY25 Profitability 52%
FY26 Profitability target 55%
AD Nick Fleischman

Note: EMD Serono is the smallest account in Rich's portfolio. By comparison, Pfizer target is $575K and Bayer is $490K.

What's Known

  • Bavencio PET is the primary ZoomRx workstream
  • Nick Fleischman manages day-to-day US relationship
  • Limited detail in Rich's AO plan — suggests the account is not a BD priority for the US team
  • Vinoth's strategic involvement (as project owner of Bavencio) is likely the main lever for growth

Growth Opportunities (to explore)

  • Expand beyond Bavencio into other EMD Serono brands
  • Introduce additional service offerings (HCP-Pt, ATU, AI capabilities)
  • Leverage Vinoth's content depth on Bavencio to build broader client relationships

This file needs enrichment — Vinoth should add his direct knowledge of the EMD Serono relationship, contacts, and growth potential.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
